subcodes.first_line: Is this in truth a noble Book, or the temple of man wherein hath been inscribed by the Pen of the All-Merciful the knowledge of what shall be and what is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ا هذا کتاب کریم ام هیکل الانسان الذی فیه رقم من قلم الرحمن علم ما یکون و ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
